experience.title: Software Developer – Backend
bullets: Maintained and extended **60+** proprietary **Python** packages: internal algorithmic tools used by GIS designers and network consultants to plan and design fibre optic network infrastructure, from small-scale local deployments to national-level rollouts.
Core work: adding new features, keeping packages current with framework/library advances, performance optimization, and resolving issues reported by GIS designers and consultants.
Maintained clean **REST API** contracts between backend packages and frontends, ensuring GIS design tools stayed reliably connected across the full stack.

Part of package maintenance included writing and maintaining **Pytest** test suites (**TDD**) per repo, with integration tests and regression tests scheduled via **Jenkins** cron jobs to run automatically and catch breakage across the ecosystem.
Configured **Jenkins** pipelines for cron-based job management across complex multi-repo packages.
Deployed critical infrastructure hotfixes under tight production constraints; optimized webhook pipelines.
Pioneered AI automation workflows using **Claude Code** and **OpenAI Codex** to eliminate repetitive developer tasks.

experience.title: Data Visualization Consultant / Data Analyst
bullets: Technical lead for a national-scale data project ingesting **100k+** real-time rows daily from a national service actively used by millions of Filipinos.
Cleaned, aggregated, and surfaced actionable metrics from raw JSON/XML telemetry using **Python**, **Presto SQL**, **PostgreSQL**, **Apache Zeppelin**, and **Apache Spark**.
Built **Apache Superset** dashboards presenting complex data insights in a way accessible to non-technical clients and stakeholders.
Contributed to customer persona classification — segmenting daily service users to enable targeted service improvements, smarter resource allocation, and data-driven business decisions.
Contributed to traffic management analytics to monitor and optimize national service load patterns.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built full-stack enterprise web applications connected to production factories in Japan — replacing manual machine checks with real-time dashboards showing live production line flow and machine conditions.

Machines on the factory floor sent status and telemetry to APIs; built the full stack (**Django**/**FastAPI** backends, **React**/**Vue.js** frontends) to ingest, process, and visualize that data for operators.
Deployed **Microservices** with **Docker** on **AWS** (S3, Lambda, EC2) using **Terraform**.
Achieved **98–100%** QA clearance across all integration contracts via strict **TDD** with **Pytest** and **Jest**.

experience.title: Part-Time College Instructor
bullets: Taught IT students full-stack web development (backend to frontend) with the goal of each student shipping a personal website by end of semester — achieved.

Taught project management to Business Administration students; cross-pollinated both courses by having biz ad students manage IT students' capstone projects — simulating real product owner / developer dynamics.
Both class goals met: IT students shipped, biz ad students completed full project documentation hitting all milestones as if submitting to a real product owner.

experience.title: IC Design Engineer
bullets: Wrote automated data parsing scripts in **Python**, **TCL**, and **Bash** to clean hardware verification logs.
Designed hardware layout specifications and schematics based on circuit theory.

experience.title: Academic Instructor
bullets: Taught General Mathematics and General Science across **8 sections** of 20–25 Senior High School students.
Managing **160+** students simultaneously across multiple sections developed strong people management, scheduling, and classroom leadership skills that carry directly into engineering team dynamics.

projects.note: Most of my work across all roles involved end-to-end development — frontend, API, and backend — but the products and software I built are proprietary and not publicly shareable. I'm happy to walk through them in detail in person. The projects below are ones I can share openly.

items.name: AI Resume Site with RAG Chatbot (this site)
bullets: Built a full-stack AI resume site with an embedded **RAG** chatbot named Folio — production-deployed, not a demo.
Stack: **FastAPI** + **LangChain** **RAG** pipeline, **OpenAI** gpt-4o-mini, **Supabase** pgvector, **React** + **TypeScript** + **Vite** + **Tailwind CSS**.
Deployed on **Railway** (backend, **Dockerized**) and **Vercel** (frontend); **SSE** token streaming, **Supabase** chat logging, 4-layer API security.

items.name: Check-App — Clinical Decision Support Chatbot
bullets: Built a Messenger chatbot triaging symptoms to medical specialists (ENT, Neurology, Ophthalmology).
**NLP** pipeline: **BeautifulSoup**/**Selenium** scraping, **SpaCy**/**SciSpaCy** preprocessing, **Gensim LDA**, **Logistic Regression** — **94% F1-score** on **7,300+** clinical records.
Awarded Best in Project Management and Best Project (Sprint 4).

personal_projects.name: Beadify
personal_projects.tagline: Turn any image into a bead art pattern
personal_projects.description: Upload a photo, set a grid size, and Beadify maps every pixel region to the nearest color in your bead palette using CIEDE2000 color matching with a K-D Tree for fast lookup. Optional Floyd-Steinberg dithering, LANCZOS downscaling, 1:1 color assignment, and multi-image tiling. The output is an interactive pegboard where you click beads to mark them done — progress auto-saves per project. Includes fill tool, region select, guide grid with focus mode, undo/redo, rulers, keyboard nav, and PNG/CSV export. Built with a FastAPI backend and a React + Vite frontend.

personal_projects.name: danpablo.dev — AI Resume Site
personal_projects.tagline: Full-stack RAG chatbot embedded in a live resume site
personal_projects.description: A production-deployed AI resume site where recruiters can chat with Folio, a RAG chatbot grounded strictly in my resume and Q&A guide. Built end-to-end: FastAPI backend with a LangChain RAG pipeline, OpenAI embeddings stored in Supabase pgvector, and a React frontend with real-time SSE token streaming. Includes 4-layer API security, conversation logging, and rate limiting modes.

personal_projects.name: Check-App
personal_projects.tagline: Clinical decision support chatbot on Facebook Messenger
personal_projects.description: A Messenger chatbot triaging user-reported symptoms to the right medical specialist — ENT, Neurology, or Ophthalmology. NLP pipeline included web scraping, SpaCy/SciSpaCy preprocessing, Gensim LDA topic modelling, and Logistic Regression — achieving 94% F1-score on 7,300+ clinical records. Awarded Best in Project Management and Best Project (Sprint 4) at Eskwelabs.
